channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large expanse of surface missing, 23rd March
item.description:

item.title: Large serving plate size pot hole, 23rd March
item.description:
Outside 17 Stancombe View Was reported in February and nothing’s been done. We’re now in March!

item.title: Hole in pavement adjacent to drain repair required, 23rd March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stancombe View, Winchcombe, Winchcombe

item.title: Abandone LPG gas cylinder in shrubbery, 23rd March
item.description:
At the end of Delphinium Drive, where the footpath leads through to Kingsclere Drive. At the end nearest Delphinium Drive it is on your left, if you're facing Kingsclere Drive, and about two metres from the footpath under the shrubs. W3W ///agree.listed.mass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Delphinium Drive, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole very hard to avoid as many other filled in poorly potholes as well, 23rd March
item.description:
As you go towards Cheltenham Rd.with the Greyhound public house on your left, on the left hand side of the carriageway pothole hard to avoid
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheldons Court, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 23rd March
item.description:
I am contacting you regarding a pothole damage claim for tyre damage caused by a pothole in Gloucestershire. The incident happened at around 2:00pm in wet conditions. My vehicle struck a pothole which caused damage to both my left side tyres. The pothole has already been reported on fix my street reference ( 9118821) and I am requesting that the relevant claim paperwork is sent to me so I can recover the cost of the damaged tyres. I have attached photographs of the pothole and the invoice/receipt for the tyre repair/replacement costs. which has been sent to (highways@gloucestershire.gov.uk) from the email address gusbirkbeck@gmail.com Please let me know if you need any further information. Claim riased on ref 70010375
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School sign is on the ground, 23rd March
item.description:
Junction of back lane and Malthouse Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Back Lane, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign structurally damaged/leaning more than 20 degrees/loose in ground (Non illuminating sign)
